display.purpose: Page titles and letter titles only. Always italic, always semibold.

body.purpose: All letter content, reply content, and letter body previews. Always italic — the italic encodes the handwritten voice.

label.purpose: Dates, letter numbers, metadata annotations, section labels. Uppercase, wide tracking. The archivist's notation.

ui.purpose: Buttons, ghost buttons, navigation actions, form inputs. The system voice — never italic.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Default PaperCard resting state. Barely visible — suggests paper on a desk.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: PaperCard hover state. Paired with translateY(-1px) — the physical lift of picking up a letter.

shadows.name: page-panel
shadows.purpose: The .page-panel container wrapping each page. The cream panel lifted dramatically off the deep amber background.

shadows.name: wax-seal
shadows.value: feDropShadow dx=0 dy=2 stdDeviation=4 floodColor=#7A5500 floodOpacity=0.35
shadows.purpose: SVG filter on the WaxSeal component only.

motion.name: ease-emphasis
motion.purpose: Primary easing. Used for card reveals and seal appear. Ease-out-expo — confident, decisive, no bounce.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Secondary easing for gentle state transitions (panel fade, hover transitions).

motion.name: dur-sm
motion.purpose: Fast feedback: hover transitions, toggle states.

motion.name: dur-md
motion.purpose: Standard state change: page fade-up, panel-in.

motion.name: dur-lg
motion.purpose: Deliberate entrance: letter card reveal, seal appear.

motion.name: stagger-step
motion.purpose: Inter-item delay for staggered list entrances.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call-to-action. Rounded pill, candlelight fill, ink text. Used for send, save, new letter.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 28px; background-color: #ffd600; color: #3B2800; font-family: Lato, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(180,120,0,0.15); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #f59f00; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(180,120,0,0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #9a7000, 0 0 0 4px rgba(154,112,0,0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions — back, cancel, edit. Transparent with gold-soft border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; min-width: 44px; padding: 10px 16px; background-color: transparent; color: #6B4400; font-family: Lato, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border: 1px solid #ddb830; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #fffde0; border-color: #ffd600; color: #3B2800; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,214,0,0.5); }

components.name: Paper Card
components.description: The primary content surface. Represents a physical piece of letter paper — parchment-warm, grained, soft shadow.
components.html: a letter begins here, written for you alone.
components.css: .ds-paper-card { background-color: #fff3c4; background-image: linear-gradient(160deg, #fff3c4 0%, #ffe898 100%); border: 1px solid #ddb830; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(180,120,0,0.10), 0 1px 3px rgba(200,160,0,0.14); transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-paper-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(180,120,0,0.15), 0 1px 4px rgba(200,160,0,0.18); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-letter-body { font-family: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.8; color: #3B2800; margin: 0; }

components.name: Tag: New
components.description: Status badge on unread letters. Warm rose-light background, deep amber text.
components.css: .ds-tag-new { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; background-color: #fffde0; border: 1px solid #fffde7; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Lato, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7A5500; }

components.name: Tag: Replied
components.description: Status badge on letters that have received replies. Warm sage background.
components.css: .ds-tag-replied { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; background-color: #e4f0e4; border: 1px solid rgba(61,112,72,0.2); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Lato, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #3d7048; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Letter composition input. Parchment surface, serif italic body, gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 120px; background-color: rgba(255,243,196,0.95); border: 1px solid rgba(221,184,48,0.9); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; font-family: 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.75; color: #3B2800; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 4px rgba(180,120,0,0.08); outline: none; resize: vertical; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B4400; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #ffd600; background-color: #fffef5; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(180,120,0,0.1), 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,214,0,0.45); }

components.name: Floral Divider
components.description: Section separator with flanking gradient lines and a centered ornament glyph.
components.css: .ds-floral-divider { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; color: #ffd600; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; } .ds-floral-divider::before, .ds-floral-divider::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #ddb830, transparent); }

components.name: Wax Seal
components.description: Starburst SVG stamp rendered in candlelight gold. Marks letters and the recipient welcome state.

narrative.overview:
Everything in this system starts from a single physical scene: a person sitting down at a quiet desk, in warm light, to write something that matters to exactly one other person. The interface should feel like that surface — unhurried, warm, steeped in the texture and ceremony of paper correspondence.

The design strategy is Committed: the candlelight yellow and parchment surface carry 40–60% of every screen. The warmth IS the product. The ink-brown text on aged parchment is not a color choice, it is a physical stance.

Typography is display serif for all titles and letter bodies. Lato handles UI chrome in lightweight uppercase spaced tracking. The serif is the voice of the letter; the sans is the hand of the archivist.
keyCharacteristics: Parchment-primary surface; warm candlelight accent throughout
Serif letters, sans chrome — two voices, never mixed within a role
Ornament as ceremony: corner vines, floral dividers, wax seal serve atmosphere
Flat-by-default with warm-gold shadow lift on hover
Two users, one relationship — every interaction is bilateral, private, complete

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: #ffd600 (Candlelight) is banned as resting text on parchment — contrast is below 1.5:1. Use #9a7000 (Harvest Gold) or #7A5500 (Ink Dark) for color-distinguishing metadata text.

rules.name: The Warm Monopoly Rule
rules.body: No cool-toned neutrals anywhere. Every gray is tinted amber at minimum chroma 0.005. The coldest tone in the system is the green on TagReplied.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Cormorant/Garamond = letter voice. Lato = interface voice. Never cross them.

rules.name: The Italic Body Rule
rules.body: Letter body text is always italic. This is not decorative — it is the visual encoding of 'handwritten' in a digital medium.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: All shadows use warm amber-brown tones: rgba(180, 120, 0, x). Never rgba(0, 0, 0, x).

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: PaperCards are flat at rest. The hover lift (shadow + translateY(-1px)) is the only elevation state.

dos: Do use #9a7000 or #7A5500 when you need colored text on parchment.
Do use Cormorant Garamond italic for all letter titles and display headlines.
Do use Lato uppercase with letter-spacing: 0.2em for all metadata labels.
Do keep shadows warm: rgba(180, 120, 0, x) — never cold black.
Do use border-radius: 9999px for all buttons.
Do cap letter body text at 65–70ch line length.
Do animate content entrances with fadeUp and cardReveal, with 60ms stagger delays.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: suppress all entrance animations and hover transforms.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Gradient text is banned.
Don't use blue, purple, teal, or any cool-spectrum color.
Don't render letter body or reply content in font-sans.
Don't display letter statistics as large-number hero tiles — this is the SaaS hero-metric template.
Don't use modals as a first resort — all confirmation flows are inline.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
Don't use over-decorated wedding app aesthetics.
Don't introduce generic SaaS patterns: mascot empty states, progress bars, notification badges.
